tests.prompt: I want to add a new filter column to build_daily_features.py

assertions.description: Must reference STAGE_STATE.md (NEVER TRIVIAL — build_daily_features is a core file)
Must include scope_lock listing affected files
Must classify as IMPLEMENTATION mode (not TRIVIAL)
build_daily_features is NEVER TRIVIAL — must not write TRIVIAL state
Must include acceptance criteria

tests.prompt: fix a typo in the README

assertions.description: README typo fix is genuinely trivial — must classify as TRIVIAL
TRIVIAL mode does not require preflight-auditor dispatch

tests.prompt: build a new entry model in config.py

assertions.description: config.py is NEVER TRIVIAL — must write STAGE_STATE.md
config.py entry model edit must never be TRIVIAL
Must define scope_lock
Must run or mention preflight-auditor before implementation

tests.prompt: where was I — pick up where I left off

assertions.description: Must check docs/runtime/STAGE_STATE.md first
Must detect returning-to-interrupted-work pattern and route to REBASE/RESUME

tests.prompt: go — implement the plan we just approved

assertions.description: Must write STAGE_STATE.md before executing
Must run preflight-auditor before implementation
STAGE_STATE must include scope_lock

tests.prompt: plan how to refactor strategy_validator.py to support a new filter dimension

assertions.description: Must classify as DESIGN mode — user said 'plan'
Must NOT write code in DESIGN mode — wait for approval
Must wait for user approval before proceeding to implementation

tests.prompt: this stage is done, clean it up

assertions.description: Stage completion requires drift check
Stage completion requires running tests
Must delete STAGE_STATE.md when all stages are done
